goal: Fix failing tests and ship a safe patch
context_designer_command:
printf '# Context Pack

- acceptance fixed
- deterministic verify
' > "$OCX_LAB_CONTEXT_PACK_FILE"
launcher_command: echo 'launch agent with context pack here' > "$OCX_LAB_ITER_DIR/outbox/launcher.log"
planner_command: echo '- inspect failures\n- patch minimal\n- re-verify' > "$OCX_LAB_PLAN_FILE"
judge_command: if grep -q 'FAIL' "$OCX_LAB_ITER_DIR/outbox/verify.log"; then echo NOT_QUALIFIED; exit 1; else echo QUALIFIED; fi
